# tenableio_network (Resource)

Manages a network in Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the network.

### Optional

- `assets_ttl_days` (Number) The number of days to keep assets (14-365).
- `description` (String) The description of the network.

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) The user who created the network.
- `created_in_seconds` (Number) Unix timestamp when the network was created.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default network.
- `modified_in_seconds` (Number) Unix timestamp when the network was last modified.
- `scanner_count` (Number) Number of scanners assigned to this network.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the network.
